title: isocoma menziesii var. vernonioides
intro: Isocoma menziesii var. vernonioides, also known as Eastern Yellow Balsamroot, is a perennial plant native to the eastern United States, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Isocoma menziesii var. vernonioides include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and fever reduction. Isocoma menziesii var. vernonioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
